mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Assignments (id, classId, title, deadline, createdAt, isPersonalized, targetGrade) VALUES (#{id}, #{classId}, #{title}, #{deadline}, #{createdAt}, #{isPersonalized}, #{targetGrade})

INSERT INTO Assignment_Words (id, assignmentId, wordId) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.assignmentId}, #{item.wordId})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM Users WHERE classId = #{classId} AND role = 'student'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO Assignment_Progress (id, assignmentId, studentId, status, progress) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.assignmentId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.status}, #{item.progress})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sw.wordId FROM Student_Words sw JOIN Users u ON sw.studentId = u.id WHERE u.classId = #{classId} AND sw.incorrectCount > 0
